The hour hand is at 3. A right angle is 90 degrees. The minute hand needs to rotate to a position that forms a 90-degree angle with the hour hand. Since the hour hand is at 3, it is at 90 degrees from the 12. The minute hand needs to rotate to 30 degrees past the 3, which is 150 degrees from the 12.
